No Poverty.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to poverty eradication.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it directly provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and explicitly aims to equip students with relevant skills for employment and career development (Target 4.4) in UX design.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course explicitly prepares students for professional design work and career development, directly supporting decent work (Target 8.5). Its focus on AI and UX design also fosters innovation and technological upgrading (Target 8.2).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course directly focuses on advanced UX design, AI, and developing 'Technology R&D and system development capability,' strongly aligning with Target 9.5 for enhancing scientific research and technological innovation.
evidence: 具備科技研發與系統開發能力

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course emphasizes 'Teamwork capability' as a core competency, which is a foundational skill for effective collaboration and partnerships, indirectly supporting Target 17.16 and 17.17.
